texts.content_text1: At the end of this module you ...
texts.content_text20: will be able to identify key factors within correctional environments that impact the mental health of detainees.
texts.content_text21: will be able to recognise early warning signs of mental health distress and potential self-harm among detainees.
texts.content_text22: will be able to explain the importance of timely referral to mental health professionals when risks or symptoms are identified.
texts.content_text23: will be able to describe the challenges affecting correctional staff mental health and the importance of seeking support services.
